name: Vozrozhdenie Bank (PJSC)
summary: Vozrozhdenie Bank (PJSC) provides various banking products and services to individuals, small business customers, corporate clients, and financial institutions in Russia. It operates through Corporate and Investment Business, Small and Medium Business, Retail Business, Treasury, and Other segments. The company offers checking and current accounts, demand and time deposits, and certificates of deposit; corporate portfolio, corporate, retail portfolio, mortgage, consumer, car, bank card, and individual loans, as well as loans to small and medium-sized enterprises; guarantee and overdraft facilities; letters of credit; international finance; and cards. It also provides transfer and payment, currency exchange, remote banking, acquisition, cash collection, leasing, factoring, refinancing, trade finance, funds management, securities, and custodian services, as well as internet and mobile banking services; and currency buying, selling, and execution services. It operates through 116 offices and 750 ATMs. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Moscow, Russia. Vozrozhdenie Bank (PJSC) is a subsidiary of VTB Bank (PJSC).
